name: vmware
desc: VMware userworld/monitor binaries (vmx, vmkernel-adjacent) — heavy LOG/ASSERT instrumentation with 'Identifier: message' prefixes; CamelCase / Foo_Bar naming.
naming_convention: VMware C: ModuleCamelCase or Module_Verb (e.g. Vmxnet3DoTx, OvhdMem_PowerOn, PCIBus_RegisterDevice). Prefer the module prefix seen in the function's own log strings.
